subcodes.first_line: The first utterance of the Creator is this: With a breast purified from desire and defilement, and a heart cleansed from all hues and colors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نخستین گفتار کردگار اینست با سینه پاک از خواهش و آلایش و دل پاکیزه از رنگهای
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
